note: Benchmark numbers are vendor/media/third-party and provisional — coverage varies per metric; verify against official reports. Seed 2.x is ByteDance's closed/API line (not open-weight, no Ascend port); Seed 2.0 Pro numbers are Feb-2026 confirmed, Seed 2.1 Pro is a Jun-19 preview with only Code-Arena public so far. LongCat-2.0 数字为厂商自报,'全训练周期在国产芯片完成'的训练闭环主张待技术报告确认。

rows: 训练即国产芯片(HCCL,疑似 910C 未官宣,推测)

list.label: SWE-bench Verified
list.note: open frontier (80% band) ~ties closed-prev-tier; Claude Fable/Mythos 5 still ahead. MiMo-V2.5-Pro 82 is vendor/harness-reported (MiMo Code) — provisional.

list.label: SWE-bench Pro
list.note: Harder agentic-coding variant (≠ Verified). GLM-5.2 (62.1) tops the open set, ahead of GPT-5.5 (~58.6); media/vendor-reported, partial coverage.

list.label: Artificial Analysis Index
list.note: AA Intelligence Index v4.1 (points). Open-weight models clustered ~50–55.

list.label: LiveCodeBench
list.note: Competitive programming. DeepSeek-V4 / Kimi lead; partial coverage.

list.label: AIME (math)
list.note: Math. GLM line tops it; mixed 2025/2026 AIME, partial coverage. GLM-5.2 number is AIME 2026 (media/vendor).

list.label: GPQA Diamond
list.note: Graduate-level science QA. Open models now cluster 88–94%.

list.label: MMLU-Pro
list.note: Broad knowledge/reasoning. Qwen3.5 leads the reported open set.

list.label: Context window
list.note: Max context (tokens). GLM-5.2 1M is vendor-stated; one source says 200K+.

list.label: Output price
list.note: $/1M output tokens — lower is better. M3 promo pricing; sparse coverage. Seed is closed-API pricing.

list.label: Code Arena · Frontend (Elo)
list.note: LMArena Code-Arena Frontend Elo. Seed 2.1 Pro Preview (Jun 19 2026) entered at 1539 — 8th globally, ~tied with Claude Opus 4.6; full Seed-2.1 benchmarks pending. Only a few public Elos here.

rows: compress every m tokens' KV → top-k; layers alternate
block selection but attention on REAL KV

takeaways: Best Ascend port targets: MiniMax-M3 (plain GQA → easiest on NPU, fast decode) + GLM-5.2 (MIT base for RL post-training); DeepSeek-V4 as the already-supported large rollout/eval baseline.
Decode-side sparse attention directly eases Ascend's no-sleep-mode rollout/train memory contention — quantify it in the benchmark.
Custom attention (CSA/HCA/DSA/MSA) re-implemented on NPU raises numeric-drift risk — exactly what align-probe should diagnose.
V4's validated FP8 training + Ascend 950 native FP8 make FP8 RL on Ascend a viable, high-novelty topic.

Seed 2.1 Pro (preview, Jun 19) is a strong closed coding/agent model (Code-Arena Frontend ~Opus 4.6) but it's API-only and not Ascend-portable — it sets the bar to chase, not a model to host on NPU. The Ascend story stays with the open-weight wave (DeepSeek-V4 / MiniMax-M3 / GLM-5.2).
LongCat-2.0 把"国产芯片全周期训练(含后训练/RL)"从零实证变成方向可信——1.6T MoE 全程跑在 HCCL 国产超节点(疑似 910C,未官宣),细节待技术报告核验;与 openPangu 的开源训练代码互补(见 Dispatch 20/21)。
